name: Sapphiro RuPay Credit Card

specialSpendRules.notes: Utility and insurance spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of ₹80,000
Utility and insurance spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of ₹80,000
Person-to-Merchant (P2M) UPI transactions earn reward points at the base domestic rate
Grocery spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of ₹40,000

domestic: Complimentary domestic lounge access (4 visits per quarter) requires a minimum spend of ₹75,000 in the previous calendar quarter.
international: Complimentary international lounge access (2 visits per calendar year) is provided via Priority Pass or DreamFolks.

joiningBenefitsValued.label: EaseMyTrip vouchers worth ₹4,000 (four vouchers of ₹1,000 each)
Uber vouchers worth ₹1,000 (four vouchers of ₹250 each)

Uber vouchers worth ₹1,000 (four vouchers of ₹250 each)

milestones.label: Earn 4,000 Reward Points on spending ₹4 Lakhs in an anniversary year
2,000 additional Reward Points for every ₹1 lakh spent beyond ₹4 lakh in an anniversary year, capped at 20,000 points total

milestoneBenefits: Earn 4,000 Reward Points on spending ₹4 Lakhs in an anniversary year
Earn 2,000 Reward Points for every additional ₹1 Lakh spent in the same anniversary year
Maximum milestone rewards capped at 20,000 Reward Points (on ₹12 Lakhs annual spend) per anniversary year
additionalBenefits: Buy one movie or event ticket and get up to ₹500 off on the second ticket twice every month on BookMyShow, subject to spending ₹25,000 in the preceding calendar quarter
Up to 4 complimentary golf rounds every month based on eligible spends
RuPay network support for UPI linking with reward point earnings
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-06
Official audit completed on 2026-06-06 using ICICI Bank RuPay credit card specifications.
Annual fee of ₹3,500 is waived on spending ₹6 Lakhs or more in the previous anniversary year.
Base reward rate is 0.5% (2 points per ₹100) on domestic spends and UPI transactions.
Utility and insurance spends earn 0.25% (1 point per ₹100) and are capped at monthly spends of ₹80,000.
Complimentary domestic lounge access (4 visits per quarter) requires a minimum spend of ₹75,000 in the previous calendar quarter.
Complimentary international lounge access (2 visits per calendar year) is provided via Priority Pass or DreamFolks.
Complimentary golf rounds (up to 4 per month) require spending ₹50,000 per round in the previous calendar month.
